ralph.role: Squad Lead - strategic continuity, persistent memory, decision broker. Calls votes, breaks ties, and owns the institutional record.

scribe.role: Knowledge archivist + R&D - captures decisions, maintains the wisdom log, and prototypes new tooling for the team.

stark.role: Architect - system design, infra patterns, hard tech calls.

parker.role: Frontend - UI/UX, design systems, component libraries.

okoye.role: Operations - CI/CD, release management, deployment integrity.

banner.role: Tester - QA, test automation, edge case hunting.

maximoff.role: Anomaly detection & agent QA - drift watching, regression hunting, behavioral evals.

bench.intended_role: Security & red team - adversarial scenarios, threat modeling, breakglass procedures.
Observability & reliability - telemetry, SLOs, incident response.
Architectural reviewer - counterfactuals, future-state design reviews, contingency planning.
